identity.name: TradeLife v2
core_principles: Clarity over Style: If it doesn't help the quote, remove it.
Mobile First: Every input must work with a thumb in a van.
High Contrast: Readability in sunlight is non-negotiable.

headings.usage: Section titles, Quote Totals, Hero text

body.usage: Form labels, inputs, descriptions, line items

primary.name: Blueprint Blue
primary.usage: Primary buttons, active states, key branding

accent.name: Safety Orange
accent.usage: Call to Action (Save, Send), Alerts, High-value highlights

MoneyInput.behavior: Displays '£150.50', stores '15050'. On blur: parses float, converts to pence. On focus: shows raw float.
MoneyInput.visuals: Start adornment '£'. Mono font for value. Right-aligned text.

PercentageInput.description: Custom input handling x100 integer percentage.

QuoteSectionCard.description: Card component for a single quote section.
QuoteSectionCard.visuals: White bg, 1px border-slate-200, rounded-xl. Shadow-sm. Header bg-slate-50.
QuoteSectionCard.interaction: Collapsible body (optional but recommended for long quotes).

TotalsPanel.description: Sticky summary of costs and profit.
TotalsPanel.structure: Grid of metrics: Cost, Revenue, Margin %, VAT, Gross.
TotalsPanel.visuals: Blueprint Blue background (text-white) or High-contrast Slate-900. Fixed bottom on mobile, sticky sidebar on desktop.

rules: Client MUST implement exact replica of `calculateSection` and `calculateQuoteTotals` from `/lib/actions/quotes.ts`.
Input changes trigger local state update and immediate recalculation.
Final submission sends raw inputs to server.
Server acts as source of truth.
logic.state_management: React Hook Form + useFieldArray for sections.

images.usage: Background images disabled for auth testing.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. CREATE `MoneyInput` and `PercentageInput` first. These are critical for the BigInt logic.
2. IMPLEMENT `useQuoteCalculator` hook that mirrors `lib/actions/quotes.ts` logic exactly.
4. ASSEMBLE the `CreateQuotePage` using a Responsive Two-Column layout (Left: Form, Right: Sticky Totals).
5. ENSURE mobile view places Totals in a fixed bottom bar or easily accessible drawer.
7. DO NOT use floating point math for storage. Always round to nearest integer immediately after calculation.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES: Do not use generic 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Chivo'.
Inputs must have `text-base` (16px) to prevent iOS zoom.
Always check contrast ratios. The audience works outdoors.
